case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. BLANCA ALICIA OSORTO LINAREZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT BLANCA ALICIA OSORTO LINAREZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR [VERONICA ROSALES - APPEARING FOR APOYO FINANCIERO INC.] FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00); REMARKS: RESPONDENT CAME TO SHERIFF'S OFFICE AT CITY HALL, ROOM 456 AND WAS SERVED THE DOCUMENTS. SERVED JUN-03-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT OSORTO LINAREZ, BLANCA ALICIA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT OSORTO LINAREZ, BLANCA ALICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
